Imports

../core, ../indicators, base

Types

VolumeBreakoutStrategy = ref object of Strategy
  period*: int
  volumeMultiplier*: float64
  volumeMA*: MA
  priceHighs*: seq[float64]
  priceLows*: seq[float64]
  pos*: int
  length*: int
  lastBreakoutDirection*: Position
  initialized*: bool
Volume Breakout strategy Trades breakouts confirmed by volume spikes

Procs

proc newVolumeBreakoutStrategy(period: int = 20;
                               volumeMultiplier: float64 = 1.5;
                               symbol: string = ""): VolumeBreakoutStrategy {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Create a new Volume Breakout strategy

Args: period: Lookback period for range and volume average (default 20) volumeMultiplier: Volume must exceed average by this factor (default 1.5) symbol: Symbol to trade (optional)

Returns: New VolumeBreakoutStrategy instance

Process single bar using streaming volume breakout logic
